'''Rijel-12''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where [[Doolb Snoil]] had once engaged in sensitive negotiations preventing the planet seceding from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}
